step_rationale: Myocardial-injury-associated miRNA; early ACS/AMI diagnosis and MACE prediction.
mechanism: miR-483-5p is upregulated in acute myocardial injury and predicts adverse outcomes independent of troponin.

references.title: Circulating mir-483-5p as a novel diagnostic biomarker for acute coronary syndrome and its predictive value for the clinical outcome after PCI.
